form.formComment: Second-up. First-up after four months 4th of 9 at Kempton Park All Weather on March 25 over 1600m, 2.25 len behind Blues And Royals with 59kg at $9. Previously second-up eased back early on 10th of 14 at Kempton Park All Weather on September 18 over 1400m, 9 len behind Wedonttelllies carrying 59kg at $101. Fitter for that run and expected to be in the finish this time.

form.formComment: Resuming after a three months break. Finished off last campaign third of 8 at Wolverhampton January 12 over 1400m, 1.5 len behind Because We Can with 61kg at $13. On debut ran last of 9 at Doncaster November 8 over 1200m, in the wet; 14 len behind I'll Be Back carrying 60.5kg at $29. Can measure up.

form.formComment: Second run back. Comes off a 42-day let-up.
